publishedAbstract: This article outlines the technical procedure for installing and configuring `OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) 4.20` in a `Two-Node Architecture` (`TNA`) environment. The process covers:- Foundational `OpenShift Container Platform` (OCP)` setup- `Local Storage Operator (LSO)` configuration- `ODF` deployment- Post-installation I/O validation.
publishedTitle: ODF Two Node Arbiter (TNA) topology Installation: v4.20 - Developer Preview
